summary: The diff implements a comprehensive shoes e-commerce site covering all six requirements. The backend (main.mo) seeds products, provides query functions, and uses a single actor file. The frontend includes homepage with hero/featured products, product listing with filtering/sorting, product detail navigation, cart with persistence, and a consistent streetwear theme. However, several specific acceptance criteria details have gaps or are not fully verifiable from the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Sort dropdown allows sorting by newest — the SortDropdown has a 'default' option labeled Newest, but the ProductListingPage logic for actually applying the sort is not visible in the diff (page file was omitted due to limits), so correct implementation cannot be confirmed.
missing_requirements.reason: The ProductListingPage file is among the omitted files, so it cannot be confirmed that the sort options actually filter or re-order the product list displayed in the grid.

missing_requirements.requirement: Product detail page showing multiple product images per REQ-3 AC.
missing_requirements.reason: The ProductDetailPage file was omitted from the diff. Additionally, the backend Product type only stores a single image field, making multiple images per product unlikely.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend actor stores products with an 'imageFilename' field as specified in the AC.
missing_requirements.reason: The AC specifies the field should be named 'imageFilename', but the backend defines the field as 'image' in both the Shoe and Product types.

hallucinated_features.description: Shopping cart includes a shipping cost calculation ($9.99 flat rate) and displays a total combining subtotal and shipping.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only requires an order subtotal display in the cart. Shipping cost calculation was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Cart includes a 'Clear cart' button to remove all items at once.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asks for removing individual items or changing quantity. A bulk clear-all function was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer component with brand info, shop category links, and informational links such as About Us, Size Guide, Returns, and Contact.
hallucinated_features.reason: No footer was specified in the build request requirements or acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: Full Internet Identity authentication infrastructure including InternetIdentityProvider, AuthClient, DelegationIdentity, and identity-based actor creation.
hallucinated_features.reason: User authentication or account management is explicitly listed as a non-goal in the build request.

hallucinated_features.description: Product cards include a category badge overlay on the product image.
hallucinated_features.reason: Product card requirements specify image, name, price, and Add to Cart button only. A category badge overlay was not requested.
